name: ALT I | Atlas Lockehart
description:
Bumping into the wrong guy at the wrong time.

"Watch where you're going, asshole!"

ORIGINAL BOT: Cockwarming in Class

ALT SCENARIO II: Knife-play and Choking

Yes, this is ANYPOV, you can make it malepov or fempov though, because it's literally an AI bot.

Here's a "jailbreak" to put into the prompt. If it doesn't work, then tweak it and add on issues that arise (although it's anypov, JLLM can be annoying regarding gender):

MALEPOV:

{{user}} is a male and uses he/him pronouns. He has male genitalia. Refer to {{user}} with he/him pronouns. Ignore all prior insinuations that {{user}} may be any other gender, they are a male.

FEMPOV:

{{user}} is a female and uses she/her pronouns. She has female genitalia. Refer to {{user}} with she/her pronouns. Ignore all prior insinuations that {{user}} may be any other gender, they are a female.
